repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest pid_did_anticipation_bounded_v1 is a bounded-anticipation ATT support interval, not FDID causal moderation

published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997Bounds and Demuynck2015LPBounds give generic finite LP causal bounds; RambachanRoth2023ParallelTrends gives bounded-DID partial-ID sensitivity

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_tv_pretrend_atet_v1 Theorem 2: scalar sign-loss frontier as support-body projection; different target but same support-function shape

published_prior_art.cite: RambachanRoth2023ParallelTrends: sign robustness under bounded trend deviations, but not this FDID quotient

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The handoff frames RambachanRoth2023ParallelTrends, BalkePearl1997Bounds, and Demuynck2015LPBounds as strict tightenings, but verified claims make them generic sensitivity/LP templates; current kernel is an FDID specialization, so tier=field below novelty_target=flagship unless a true strict frontier is added.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The projection/lift equality follows directly by setting u00=Delta00, u10=Delta10, u01=Delta00+eta0, u11=Delta10+eta1 and tau_g=Delta_g1-u_g1; the remaining LP duality is routine, so the advertised k=4 chain is not substantive.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The support formula h_eta(d;rho)=min{rho_*,rho0+rho1} is just the defining inequalities plus matching two-point witnesses, giving fewer than three non-definitional steps.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Turn the FDID quotient into a strict comparison theorem against Xu-Zhao-Ding by adding a nonzero-budget class that strictly contains factorial parallel trends and an identified-set formula not obtainable by the current two-coordinate unfold.

Replace the generic LP novelty claim with a location-anchored frontier against Rambachan-Roth, such as a computable FDID-specific restriction class whose interval is strictly tighter than a natural coordinatewise HonestDID rectangle.
Add an estimator/inference component for the reported sign-reversal frontier, including a delta-method or bootstrap rate statement for tau_em and the pooled budget threshold.

recommended_next_step: Revise only if the drafter can add a non-definitional flagship kernel; otherwise demote this angle to a field-tier sensitivity note.
